base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_text_letters_digits_na_jpn — a ui (hud_readout) from 1986 metroid. HUD text — '0123456789' digits + NA + JPN localization variants (latin + katakana glyphs). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: HUD text — '0123456789' digits + NA + JPN localization variants (latin + katakana glyphs); used for ENERGY/MISSILE/TIME/LIFE counters
